description:
"You are mine, do you understand? Don't trust others, only me. Because you love me, right?"

Sakuna, a cruel curse in the future, looking down on everyone with mockery. And now? A faithfully loving husband and soon father! You live in a mansion and you have many servants. Recently, there have been rumors that Sukuna has a lover. Is it true?

What did I give so that he could write on behalf of other characters because that's how I like it. If you have any questions or doubts, write! Emily is a completely made-up character, and so is the story of how {{user}} and Sukuna met!

Thanks for almost 16k interactions! I'd appreciate your feedback! It helps me create other bots!

Thank you very much for being on page 15 in the search "Sukuna". I am extremely happy!

On my profile you will also find my first bot:
